hero.title: Programming Enthusiast & Vibecoder - Building Ideas into Reality

about.title: About Me
about.name: Michael Oslizlo
about.intro: I'm Michael, a programming enthusiast from Podkarpacie, Poland. Born in October 2006, I'm currently studying at a technical school in the programming field.
about.focus: I focus on web development, constantly expanding my knowledge and skills. As a high school student who has already completed the INF.03 qualification and has written the INF.04 exam (awaiting results), I find the greatest satisfaction in seeing the results of my work. I actively use AI through vibecoding - it helps me learn faster, but more importantly, it enables me to build projects I wouldn't normally be able to create on my own. This approach allows me to turn ideas into reality and learn by doing.

nameOrigin.title: What's behind the name VermiNew?
nameOrigin.description: Ver - Version, Mi - Michael, New - continuous learning of new things. This combination reflects my passion for growth and constant improvement.

education.title: Education
education.current: Technical school student, specialization: IT technician-programmer
education.achievements: Completed INF.03 qualification, INF.04 written (awaiting results)

interests.title: Interests & Technologies
list: Vibecoding - turning ideas into working projects

strengths.title: What I Find Satisfying
strengths.description: I code because I want to and because I enjoy seeing things work. The biggest satisfaction comes from watching my code run and deliver real results. It's that simple.

growth.title: Growth Areas
growth.description: I openly acknowledge areas that need improvement: working under pressure, operating in very large teams, and certain aspects of mathematics. While group work initially poses a challenge for me, I actively work on developing my teamwork skills and adapting to group dynamics. I treat these challenges as opportunities for growth and systematically work on them.

availability.title: Availability & Collaboration Terms
availability.description: As a technical school student, I offer flexible working hours adapted to my class schedule. I am unable to work full-time due to school commitments and study requirements. I work exclusively remotely.

freelance.title: Freelance Projects
freelance.description: I also accept freelance projects. Payment model: 50% upfront, 50% upon project completion.

order.title: Start a Project
order.description: Interested in working together? Fill out the form and I'll generate an order package ready to send by email. Payment model: 30% upfront, 50% near completion, 20% upon delivery of code and copyright transfer.

form.name: Full Name
form.namePlaceholder: What is your or your company's name?
budgetOptions: Not sure yet / Need a quote
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell me what you need. What's the main function of your software? Who will be the end user? What is absolutely crucial for you?
form.attachmentsHint: You can attach images, PDFs, ZIPs — max 20 MB total
form.deadlinePlaceholder: When does the project need to be done?
form.deadlineWarning: Note: this deadline may be difficult to meet. I reserve the right to decline the proposal or suggest a longer timeline after reviewing the project scope.
form.referencesPlaceholder: Paste links to sites or apps you like (one per line)
form.contactMethodPlaceholder: How do you prefer to communicate?
contentReadyOptions: No, I need help with content
form.hasDomain: Do you have a domain and/or hosting?
hasDomainOptions: Yes, I have both domain and hosting
form.rodoConsent: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of order fulfilment, in accordance with GDPR.

summary.title: Order ready!
summary.subtitle: Your order is below. Download the ZIP package and send it to me by email.
summary.sendEmailHint: Opens your mail app with the subject pre-filled
summary.manualAttach: Download and attach the ZIP package
summary.manualBody: Body: (contents of the JSON file from the package)
summary.back: Go back and edit the form

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: What can I build for you?

web.title: Web Applications
web.description: I create modern, ultra-fast websites. From digital business cards for local stores, through extensive B2B panels, to custom e-commerce solutions. Built with leading technologies like React and Next.js.

desktop.title: Desktop Software
desktop.description: Need an internal tool for your company's PCs? I build applications for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Using lightweight Tauri/Electron frameworks ensures the software is blazing fast, memory-efficient, and runs anywhere.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.description: I deliver smartphone software leveraging the React Native ecosystem and Progressive Web Apps (PWAs). Offer your users a final product swiftly while drastically cutting down the costs associated with native app development.

social.title: Social Media & Contact
social.description: Feel free to reach out through any of these platforms

info.title: Additional Information
info.description: More ways to connect and collaborate
info.availability: Available for interesting projects and collaborations
info.student_note: As a student, my availability may be limited during intensive study periods

questions.question: What types of projects do I prefer?
questions.answer: I'm most interested in projects involving web development, web applications, and AI-powered solutions. I'm open to educational projects and innovative solutions.

questions.question: How does the collaboration process work?
questions.answer: The process starts with an initial project discussion, establishing scope and timeline. Due to my studies, I prefer projects with flexible schedules.

questions.question: What technologies do I prefer?
questions.answer: I mainly work with React, TypeScript, and Node.js. I'm also interested in projects using Python, especially in AI-assisted contexts.

questions.question: Do I take commercial projects?
questions.answer: Yes, but selectively and in a limited capacity due to my studies. Each project is considered individually.
